positive: A stylized, continuous line art illustration of a whimsical forest creature, combining elements of a fox, deer, and celestial body. The creature is depicted in a dynamic, elegant pose, leaping over stylized flora (ferns, moss, wildflowers). The style should be sophisticated, minimalist, and inspired by Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, but rendered with modern, fine-line tattoo aesthetic. Strong use of negative space and clean silhouettes are crucial. Color palette: monochromatic deep navy and off-white, suitable for screen printing on natural fabric. Composition: Central, balanced, and contained within a square frame. Lighting: Even, high-contrast graphic lighting.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, poor resolution, low contrast, grain, dirty, cartoonish, photorealistic
